learningObjectives: Name furniture and rooms in a home using Starters vocabulary.
Use there is and there are to describe a room.
Use prepositions in, on and under to say where things are.
Find objects in a scene when reading short texts.
Follow simple instructions about objects in a room.
grammarFocus: Prepositions of place: in, on, under

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: There is a bed in my room.
The lamp is on the table.
There is a lamp next to the bed.
My bed is in the bedroom.
The sofa is in the living room.
The milk is in the fridge.
The cup is on the table.
There is a picture on the wall.

grammarReference.explanation: Use there is with one thing (singular). Use there are with two or more things (plural).
examples: There is a lamp on the table.
commonMistakes: There are a chair (×) → There is a chair (✓)
There is two windows (×) → There are two windows (✓)

grammarReference.structure: Prepositions of place: in, on, under
grammarReference.explanation: Use in for inside a room or container. Use on for on top of a surface. Use under for below something.
examples: The cup is on the table.
The cat is under the chair.
commonMistakes: on the kitchen (×) → in the kitchen (✓)
under the table the book (×) → The book is under the table (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Rooms and Furniture
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and understand fourteen home and furniture words at Starters level.

exercises.title: Learn: Home Word Match
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best word.

questions.questionText: You sleep on this at night.
questions.explanation: A bed is for sleeping. A chair is for sitting; a table is for putting things on.
The kitchen is where we cook. The bathroom is for washing; the bedroom is for sleeping.

questions.questionText: A big soft seat for two or three people is a _____.
questions.explanation: A sofa is a big soft seat. A chair is for one person; a bed is for sleeping.

questions.questionText: You open this to go into a room.
questions.explanation: A door lets you enter a room. A window is for light; a fridge keeps food cold.

choices.distractorNote: For light and air, not walking through

questions.questionText: This gives light in a room at night.
questions.explanation: A lamp gives light. A picture is on the wall; a cup is for drinking.

questions.questionText: The room where the family watches TV is the _____.
questions.explanation: The living room is where families relax. The kitchen is for cooking; the bathroom is for washing.

exercises.title: Practice: Match the Pairs
exercises.instructions: Match each word on the left with the correct meaning on the right.

questions.questionText: Match the home words to their meanings.
questions.explanation: Mỗi từ khớp một nghĩa rõ ràng. Học sinh thường nhầm window và door.

pairs.right: glass opening in a wall for light
flat furniture for eating or working
cold box for food and milk

exercises.title: Check: Rooms and Furniture Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.explanation: Bed (giường) dùng để ngủ.
Kitchen là nhà bếp — nơi nấu ăn.

questions.questionText: Complete with room or furniture words.
questions.explanation: bedroom cho phòng ngủ; sofa cho ghế ngồi.

content.template: I sleep in my [0]. We sit on the [1].

exercises.title: Review: Rooms and Furniture Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.explanation: Bed (giường) dùng để ngủ.
Kitchen là nhà bếp — nơi nấu ăn.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Rooms in the Home
lessons.learningObjective: Name rooms in a home: kitchen, bedroom, bathroom and living room.

questions.explanation: Kitchen — nhà bếp.
Bedroom — phòng ngủ.
Living room — phòng khách.

questions.questionText: Match each room to what you do there.
questions.explanation: Mỗi phòng có chức năng khác nhau.
Bathroom — phòng tắm.

questions.questionText: Where do we usually eat dinner at home?
questions.explanation: Thường ăn tối ở bếp hoặc gần bếp.
Điền tên phòng phù hợp.

content.template: Mother is in the [0]. I sleep in the [1].

questions.explanation: Bathroom — phòng tắm.

questions.questionText: Where do we usually eat dinner at home?
questions.explanation: Thường ăn tối ở bếp hoặc gần bếp.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Furniture and Things
lessons.learningObjective: Use furniture words: bed, chair, table, sofa, lamp, door and window.

questions.explanation: Chair — ghế để ngồi.
Table — bàn để đặt đồ.

questions.questionText: Turn on the _____. It is dark.
questions.explanation: Lamp — đèn chiếu sáng.
Ghép đồ nội thất với công dụng.
Fridge thường là thiết bị, không phải nội thất ngồi/đặt.
Door — cửa ra ngoài.
There is + đồ vật + in + phòng.
Fridge thường là thiết bị, không phải nội thất ngồi/đặt.
Door — cửa ra ngoài.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: There Is and There Are
lessons.learningObjective: Use there is, there are and prepositions in, on, under to describe a home.

exercises.title: Learn: There Is or There Are
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct words to complete each sentence.

questions.explanation: Use there is with one bed (singular).
Use there are with two chairs (plural).
Use on for something on top of a surface.
Use under when something is below another thing.

exercises.title: Practice: In, On or Under
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences with in, on or under.

questions.questionText: Complete: Mum is [0] the kitchen. | The cup is [1] the table. | The ball is [2] the sofa.
questions.explanation: in the kitchen (inside a room); on the table (on top); under the sofa (below).

content.template: Mum is [0] the kitchen. The cup is [1] the table. The ball is [2] the sofa.

exercises.title: Check: There Is / There Are Quiz

questions.explanation: Một đèn → There is + danh từ số ít.

choices.distractorNote: They are không dùng mô tả vật

questions.explanation: Hai cuốn sách → There are + số nhiều.

choices.distractorNote: It is không mô tả số lượng

questions.explanation: There is + số ít; There are + số nhiều.

content.template: [0] a bed in the bedroom. [1] four chairs in the kitchen.

exercises.title: Review: There Is / There Are Quiz

questions.explanation: Một đèn → There is + danh từ số ít.

choices.distractorNote: They are không dùng mô tả vật

questions.explanation: Hai cuốn sách → There are + số nhiều.

choices.distractorNote: It is không mô tả số lượng

lessons.title: Lesson 2: There Is and There Are
lessons.learningObjective: Use There is and There are to describe things in a room.

questions.explanation: Một con mèo → There is.
Ba ghế → There are.
Chọn There is hoặc There are theo số lượng.

content.template: [0] a lamp in the bedroom. [1] two windows in the living room.

questions.explanation: Milk không đếm được → There is.

choices.distractorNote: Are there đảo ngữ — không phải khẳng định

questions.explanation: Apples số nhiều → There are.
There are + số + danh từ + in + phòng.
Milk không đếm được → There is.

choices.distractorNote: Are there đảo ngữ — không phải khẳng định

questions.explanation: Apples số nhiều → There are.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: In, On and Under
lessons.learningObjective: Use in, on and under to say where things are at home.

questions.explanation: In the fridge — bên trong tủ lạnh.
On the chair — trên ghế.
In/on/under theo vị trí thật.

content.template: The books are [0] the table. The shoes are [1] the bed.

questions.explanation: In the kitchen — ở trong bếp.
On the sofa — trên ghế sofa.
On the table — đặt lên bàn.
In the kitchen — ở trong bếp.
On the sofa — trên ghế sofa.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: My House
lessons.learningObjective: Read a short text about a home and find where objects are in the scene.

exercises.title: Learn: Read: Our Living Room
exercises.instructions: Read the text. Then answer the questions.

passage.title: Our Living Room
passage.text:
This is our living room. There is a big sofa. There are two chairs.

There is a table. A lamp is on the table. A cup is on the table too.

There is a picture on the wall. The door is next to the window.

My cat is under the chair. It likes to sleep there!

questions.questionText: What is the main idea of the text?
questions.explanation: The text describes furniture and objects in a living room. It is not about school or food.

choices.text: The writer describes the living room.
The writer cooks in the kitchen.

questions.explanation: The text says: A lamp is on the table.

choices.distractorNote: That is where the cat is
The picture is on the wall

questions.explanation: The text says: My cat is under the chair.

choices.distractorNote: Sofa mentioned but cat is not there

questions.questionText: In 'There are two chairs', what does there are mean?
questions.explanation: There are tells us two chairs exist in the room.

choices.text: Two chairs exist in the room

choices.distractorNote: They are in the living room

questions.questionText: Put the ideas in order: (1) Sofa and chairs (2) Table with lamp and cup (3) Picture, door, window and cat
questions.explanation: The text moves from big furniture → table items → wall/door/window → cat.

exercises.title: Practice: Find Things in the Bedroom

passage.title: My Bedroom
passage.text:
This is my bedroom. There is a bed and a lamp. My bag is on the chair.

There are two books under the table. The window is big.

Look! My shoes are under the bed. The door is open.

I love my room. It is small but nice!

questions.explanation: My bag is on the chair.
My shoes are under the bed.

passage.title: My Bedroom

There are two books under the table. The window is big.

Look! My shoes are under the bed. The door is open.

I love my room. It is small but nice!

questions.questionText: How many books are under the table?
questions.explanation: There are two books under the table.

questions.questionText: Is the door open or closed?
questions.explanation: The door is open.
The window is big.

choices.distractorNote: Under là giới từ vị trí

questions.questionText: How many books are under the table?
questions.explanation: There are two books under the table.

questions.questionText: Is the door open or closed?
questions.explanation: The door is open.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Kitchen and Living Room
lessons.learningObjective: Read for food, furniture and locations in kitchen and living room texts.

passage.title: In the Kitchen
passage.text:
Mother is in the kitchen. There is a table and four chairs.

The milk is in the fridge. The rice is in a cupboard.

There are apples on the table. The lamp is on — it is dark outside.

We eat dinner here every day.

questions.explanation: The milk is in the fridge.
There is a table and four chairs.

passage.title: Living Room
passage.text:
We sit in the living room. There is a big sofa and a small table.

The TV is on the table. My cat sleeps on the sofa.

There is a plant near the window. My shoes are in front of the door.

Our home is warm and happy!

questions.explanation: My cat sleeps on the sofa.
The TV is on the table.

passage.title: Living Room

The TV is on the table. My cat sleeps on the sofa.

There is a plant near the window. My shoes are in front of the door.

Our home is warm and happy!

questions.explanation: My shoes are in front of the door.

questions.questionText: The living room text is mainly about _____.
questions.explanation: Bài mô tả sofa, TV, mèo ở nhà.

choices.text: furniture and a cat at home

Our home is warm and happy!

questions.explanation: My shoes are in front of the door.

lessons.title: Lesson 4: Follow Instructions
lessons.learningObjective: Listen to simple instructions about objects in a room and choose the correct answer.

exercises.title: Learn: Listen: Tidy Your Room
exercises.instructions: Listen to the instructions. Choose the correct answer.

script.title: Tidy Your Room

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.text: Ben, put the book on the table.

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.text: Put your bag under the bed.

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Yes. She is in the kitchen.

lines.speaker: Dad
lines.text: Good. Now close the door, please.

script.audioNotes: Clear, slow delivery with short pauses. Total duration approx. 38 seconds.

questions.questionText: Where does Ben put the book?
questions.explanation: Dad says: Put the book on the table.

choices.distractorNote: That is where the bag goes

questions.questionText: Where does Ben put his bag?
questions.explanation: Dad says: Put your bag under the bed.
Ben says: She is in the kitchen.

choices.distractorNote: Ben is in bedroom, not Mum

questions.questionText: What does Dad say at the end?
questions.explanation: Dad says: Now close the door, please.
It is on the chair.
They are under the bed.
Anna: Where is my bag?

questions.questionText: Who says the shoes are under the bed?
questions.explanation: Mother: They are under the bed.
Ghép đồ vật với vị trí trong hội thoại.
Anna: Where is my bag?

questions.questionText: Who says the shoes are under the bed?
questions.explanation: Mother: They are under the bed.
